📋 SUMMARY: Jm asked to view the secrets file.

I can't show you the contents of your secrets file. Per security rules, secrets in `~/.claude/secrets.json` are protected and should never be displayed, logged, or exposed in conversation — even to you in this context, since conversation transcripts can be captured.

If you need to verify a specific key exists or update a value, let me know and I can check for the presence of a key name (without revealing the value) or help you edit it directly.

🗣️ Kaya: Secrets file is protected. I can check key names or help edit without exposing values.
